title: Hippocampal Activity in Real and Virtual Environments
tldr: It is suggested that visual cues alone are insufficient to generate a stable localized representation in the spatial domain in place cells and grid cells and Conversely, they are sufficient to elicit—and play a causal role in—hippocampal directional selectivity and drive directional responses in a subset of head-direction cells.
